## Description / 变更说明

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why / 简要描述本次 PR 做了什么以及为什么 -->

## Type of Change / 变更类型

- [ ] feat: New feature / 新功能
- [ ] fix: Bug fix / 修复
- [ ] docs: Documentation / 文档变更
- [ ] refactor: Refactoring / 重构
- [ ] test: Tests / 测试
- [ ] chore: Maintenance / 杂项

## Scope / 影响范围

- [ ] Product layer / 产品层（rules/, skills/, knowledge/, .claude-plugin/）
- [ ] Dev layer / 开发层（.claude/, docs/, tests/, dev-scripts/）
- [ ] Both / 两者

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] `bash dev-scripts/validate-all.sh` passes / 通过
- [ ] Layer separation check passes / 分层检查通过
- [ ] `plugin.json` synced with filesystem / 与实际文件同步
- [ ] New Skills use legal frontmatter fields only / 新 Skill 仅使用合法字段
- [ ] Templates use `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` format / 模板使用占位符格式
- [ ] Hook scripts have executable permission and shebang / Hook 有执行权限
- [ ] Commit messages follow `<type>(<scope>): <description>` / 提交遵循规范

## Testing / 测试方式

<!-- Describe how to verify this change / 描述如何验证此变更 -->
